# CWE-427 positive: PATH prepended from POST body (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-427-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
)

func RenderReportPDF(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	userBin := r.FormValue("helper_path")
	_ = os.Setenv("PATH", userBin+string(os.PathListSeparator)+os.Getenv("PATH"))
	cmd := exec.Command("pdftopng", r.FormValue("input"))
	if err := cmd.Run(); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
